purposeDescription: Lincoln subset of the Sacrifice Law comparative corpus. This link records the American Civil War Union case's participation in the four-case sacrifice-law-workbench corpus for cross-case comparison under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice.
distinctionFromLincolnDeepCorpus: This subset is not the lincoln-deep-28 corpus. The lincoln-deep-28 corpus supports single-case Lincoln mechanism discovery through the Lincoln metaphor-analysis evidence module. This Sacrifice Law subset supports cross-case comparison only and does not provide PPW deep Lincoln annotation, passage extraction, claim extraction, interpretation, or scoring by itself.

claimStatus.notes: No Sacrifice Law child-repository claims, public support ratings, or comparative conclusions are promoted into PPW findings by this link. Any future draft claims must enter PPW at reviewStatus: draft and pass the PPW claim-promotion gate before appearing as reviewed findings.
